DescribeLLMTracesStatistics.filters: Filter list. Supported filter fields: sessionId (session ID), userId (user ID), duration (response time in ms), inputTokens (number of input tokens), outputTokens (number of output tokens), totalTokens (total number of tokens)
DescribeLLMTracesStatistics.filters.op: Filter operator. Options: `=` - equal, `:` - equal, `!=` - not equal, `contains` - contains, `in` - in array, `>` - greater than, `>=` - greater than or equal to, `<` - less than, `<=` - less than or equal to
DescribeLLMTracesStatistics.filters.value: Single value, applicable to operators: =, !=, contains, >, >=, <, <=
DescribeLLMTracesStatistics.filters.values: Multiple values, applicable to operator: in
